name: Nectarine and Ham Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 oz cooked ham, cut into julienne strips
2 cups sliced nectarines, peaches or plums
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl, mix the oil, vinegar, ginger, and salt until well combined.
2. Add the ham, fruit, and spinach to the bowl.
3. Toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
4. Serve immediately.
